project.name: AI Comparison
project.description: Logistics platform for automated quote comparison via AI/OCR.

features: Hybrid Quote Analysis (Stat Cards + Markdown Expert Report)

api_endpoints.explained: Extracts data from uploaded PDFs and generates a comparison analysis with anti-hallucination measures.
Handles conversation with Logistics Co-Pilot within the context of quote analysis.
Returns the connectivity status and model name of the Ollama server.

decisions.decision: Sử dụng Microservices-like architecture trong cùng NestJS app.
decisions.rationale: Dễ quản lý và kết nối dữ liệu nhanh giữa các module.

decisions.decision: Dùng CSS display:none cho Dashboard trong App.tsx.
decisions.rationale: Giữ cho Dashboard luôn được mount giúp bảo toàn state và tránh mất dữ liệu khi chuyển tab.
Giảm bớt thao tác thủ công cho người dùng, đảm bảo hệ thống AI luôn sẵn sàng.

decisions.decision: Regex JSON Extraction strategy in APIs
decisions.rationale: Small LLMs (Qwen 0.5b) sometimes hallucinate conversational text around JSON. Extracting content via first `{` and last `}` prevents JSON.parse crashes.
Force AI to respond with N/A instead of inventing Carrier names or prices when parsing lacks data.
Using markers (--- CLEANED DATA ---) to separate clean tables from raw text, allowing LLM to target smaller context for extraction.
Systemic hangs in LLM should not deadlock the Node.js server. 60s/120s limits ensure UI responsiveness.

decisions.decision: Lighter Model Strategy for low-RAM machines
decisions.rationale: Switched to qwen3:0.6b because machine has only 1.7GB RAM free, insufficient for 4b model (2.5GB).
